overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character moves through covered walkways beneath transit overpasses, crosses intersections with sparse vehicle traffic, and navigates past street vendors while surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and glowing signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath transit overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath overpass, passing illuminated billboards and neon signs

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text with yellow and black graphics
vertical neon billboard with pink and blue lighting displaying 'MEET DREAM'
tall vertical billboard showing romantic couple with 'AVANTE' branding
elevated transit walkway structure spanning across the street above
black metal street lamp with dual lights on sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a covered transit overpass in a futuristic city at night. The sidewalk is flanked by massive illuminated billboards including 'PURE OVERKILL' and 'AVANTE' advertisements. The area is sheltered from the sky with neon lighting reflecting off the wet asphalt surface. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertisements and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with vehicle traffic and wider sky visibility
large brown cargo truck passes through intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while navigating around vehicles, turning slightly right toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
large brown cargo truck with blue container passing through intersection

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with 'EL FLAMINGO' text and flamingo imagery
circular illuminated sign for Orbital Air company on distant building
suspended traffic signal with green light illuminated

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The 'EL FLAMINGO' billboard dominates the right side while vehicles including a large cargo truck pass through the intersection. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk under the glow of streetlights and holographic signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor walkway with security barricades and illuminated stalls

events.description: enters area with illuminated vendor stalls, umbrellas, and yellow-black security barricades

agents.ego_description: walking past vendor stalls and security barricades, following the sidewalk alongside the street

notable_agents.action: vendor in red tank top and jeans walking alongside the barricades

entered.detail: street vendor stalls with illuminated umbrellas and merchandise displays
yellow and black striped metal barricades with coiled razor wire on top
large vertical billboard with 'MILITECH' branding and weapon imagery

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk lined with street vendor stalls protected by yellow-black security barricades and razor wire. The 'MILITECH' billboard is visible on the left while the overhead transit bridge recedes into the distance. Moderate pedestrian traffic walks in the same direction past the illuminated vendor umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful marked intersection with heavy neon advertising and cybernetic pedestrians

events.description: stepping onto colorful crosswalk with distinctive red and yellow striped markings
turns left to follow crosswalk direction while navigating through pedestrian crowd

agents.ego_description: crossing the colorful intersection among pedestrians with visible cybernetic enhancements and glowing implants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple cybernetic legs crossing the street
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner with various cybernetic implants

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying energy drink advertisement with 'IT'S BIG' text and can imagery
distinctive red and yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
multi-story building with green neon trim and large windows

segments.scene_description: Crossing a vividly marked intersection with red and yellow striped crosswalk patterns. The massive 'IT'S BIG' energy drink billboard towers on the right while pedestrians with glowing cybernetic legs and implants cross in various directions. The scene is bathed in neon light from surrounding advertisements as the camera turns left to follow the crosswalk path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis, moving from the sheltered confines of a transit overpass into wide, open intersections. It begins beneath a covered walkway where massive illuminated billboards for Pure Overkill and Avante reflect off wet asphalt, before emerging into a sprawling intersection dominated by the glowing El Flamingo sign and passing cargo trucks. The camera then shifts toward a sidewalk lined with street vendor stalls and security barricades, passing under the receding transit bridge while a Militech billboard looms to the left. Finally, the scene opens into a vividly marked crosswalk with red and yellow stripes, where the camera turns left beneath a towering energy drink advertisement amidst a crowd of pedestrians with glowing cybernetic implants.
